About the Murphy Book

The Murphy Book is an unofficial record of some of our adventures as a hall. The original hall Murphy Book is a chunky black notebook that lives in glounge; this part of our website is a similar (but virtual!) compilation of creative endeavors we've been getting up to.

Check out some pages of our virtual Murphy Book using the menu (or the buttons at the bottom of the page)!

Last Updated: 4/6/2022, 10:35:01 PM
